---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

### Manuscripts in Preparation / Preprints

**Damaraju N\***, Frost FG, ..., Miller DE. "Determinants of haplotype phasing accuracy in long-read human genome sequencing." *Under review.* bioRxiv: [10.64898/2026.05.04.722832](https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.05.04.722832)

**Damaraju N\***, ..., Shirts BH, Miller DE. "Evaluating long-read phasing for identity-by-descent detection in familial cohorts." *In Preparation.*

Gibson SB\*, **Damaraju N**, ..., Miller DE. "Genome-wide detection and clinical prioritization of tandem repeat outliers using long-read sequencing." *Under review.* medRxiv: [10.64898/2026.04.30.26352103](https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.04.30.26352103)

Anderson ZB\*, Prall T, **Damaraju N**, ..., Miller DE. "Long-read sequencing with targeted assembly of the opsin locus accurately evaluates genes in expressed positions." *Under review.* medRxiv: [2026.03.17.26348636](https://doi.org/10.1101/2026.03.17.26348636)

Kailash BP\*, Karthik D\*, Shinde M\*, **Damaraju N\***, ...Jayaraman G, Mahapatra N. ChassiDex: A Microbial Database Useful for Synthetic Biology Applications. bioRxiv: [10.1101/703033](https://doi.org/10.1101/703033) (2019)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Peer-Reviewed Publications

Wojcik M\*, Clark RD, .....**Damaraju N**, ......Miller DE. "Long-read sequencing is required for precision diagnosis of incontinentia pigmenti." *HGG Advances* vol. 6,3 (2025): 100468. [doi:10.1016/j.xhgg.2025.100468](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xhgg.2025.100468)

Paschal CR\*, Zalusky MPG, .... **Damaraju N**, ......Miller DE. "Concordance of Whole-Genome Long-Read Sequencing with Standard Clinical Testing for Prader-Willi and Angelman Syndromes." *The Journal of Molecular Diagnostics* vol. 27,3 (2025): 166-176. [doi:10.1016/j.jmoldx.2024.12.003](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jmoldx.2024.12.003)

Gustafson JA\*, Gibson SB\*, **Damaraju N\***, Zalusky MPG, Hoekzema K, Twesigomwe D, ....., Miller DE. "High-coverage nanopore sequencing of samples from the 1000 Genomes Project to build a comprehensive catalog of human genetic variation." *Genome Research* (2024). [doi:10.1101/gr.279273.124](https://doi.org/10.1101/gr.279273.124)

Wood K\*, **Damaraju N\***, Krevanko CF\*, Aberra A\*, Cirone P, Duncan B, Faustman EM. "Exposomics in Practice: Multidisciplinary Perspectives on Environmental Health and Risk Assessment." *Integrated Environmental Assessment and Management* (2024). [doi:10.1002/ieam.4926](https://doi.org/10.1002/ieam.4926)

**Damaraju N**, Miller AL, Miller DE. "Long-Read DNA and RNA Sequencing to Streamline Clinical Genetic Testing and Reduce Barriers to Comprehensive Genetic Testing." *Journal of Applied Laboratory Medicine* 9(1):138-150 (2024). [doi:10.1093/jalm/jfad107](https://doi.org/10.1093/jalm/jfad107)

Gadekar VP\*, **Damaraju N\***, ....., Sinha H. "Development and external validation of Indian population-specific Garbhini-GA2 model for estimating gestational age in second and third trimesters." *The Lancet Regional Health – Southeast Asia* (2024). [doi:10.1016/j.lansea.2024.100362](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.lansea.2024.100362)

Vijayram R\*, **Damaraju N\***, Xavier A\*, ....., Sinha H. "Comparison of first trimester dating methods for gestational age estimation and their implication on preterm birth classification in a North Indian cohort." *BMC Pregnancy and Childbirth* 21(1):343 (2021). [doi:10.1186/s12884-021-03807-4](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12884-021-03807-4)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Other Writing

**Damaraju N**. ["Bench-to-Bedside: A Dream or Reality?"](https://www.publichealth.columbia.edu) *Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health Student Voices Blog*, April 13, 2022.

Xavier A, Sinha H, **Damaraju N**. ["Developing India-specific pregnancy dating model from Garbhini cohort."](https://rbcdsai.iitm.ac.in) *AI for Social Good*, Robert Bosch Centre for Data Science and AI (RBCDSAI), February 9, 2021.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*\* denotes equal contribution*
